outputs.description: The category in which the detection will fire if a match is observed with any indicator in the ThreatFeed Vectra.ThreatFeed.Name The name of the ThreatFeed
outputs.name: Vectra.ThreatFeed.Category

outputs.description: The default certainty to use for indicators in the STIX file Vectra.ThreatFeed.IndicatorType The default indicatorType to use for the observables in the STIX file
outputs.name: Vectra.ThreatFeed.Certainty

outputs.description: The default duration for which indicators in the ThreatFeed are valid Vectra.ThreatFeed.ID The ID of the ThreatFeed
outputs.name: Vectra.ThreatFeed.Duration
